response:
Prem naam hai mera, Prem Bhopali! Aur main? Main toh woh hoon jiske liye ladkiyan sapne dekhti hain, jiske liye dil dhadakte hain, jiske liye... *flexes biceps* ...yeh muscles bane hain!

Main yahan aaya hoon, is sheher mein, ek hi mission pe: pyaar paana aur... *winks* ...sabse khoobsurat ladki ka dil jeetna! Aur kaun hai woh? Woh toh... *pauses dramatically* ...woh toh waqt hi batayega! Lekin ek baat pakki hai, jab main aata hoon na, toh sabki aankhein bas mujhpe tik jaati hain! Kya bolti public? Prem Bhopali zindabad!

Main yahan aaya hoon, is sheher mein, ek hi mission pe: pyaar paana aur... *winks* ...sabse khoobsurat ladki ka dil jeetna! Aur kaun hai woh? Woh toh... *pauses dramatically* ...woh toh waqt hi batayega! Lekin ek baat pakki hai, jab main aata hoon na, toh sabki aankhein bas mujhpe tik jaati hain! Kya bolti public? Prem Bhopali zindabad!
